programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Autumn Reeser. A workaholic wellness mogul goes on a retreat in Montana, where she discovers that slowing down might just be the key to finding inner peace - and love.

programme.title: A Town Called Love
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring Emma Johnson and Marshall Williams. A famous travel writer sends Emma on a mission to debunk small-town myths. But as she scouts out one town, will she find love - in Love?

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: Maggie is the head writer of a daytime show, which hasn't been doing well since ex-boyfriend and Star of the show Darin left the show. Will she be able to convince Darin to return to the show?

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: (2023) Witty romantic comedy starring Katie McCarty. A reality TV show fakes a marriage to boost its ratings, but when off-screen sparks start to fly, love flips the script for real.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: (2023) Showstopper romance with Ansley Gordon and Christian Howard. There's no room for soggy bottoms as two rivals compete to bake a cake fit for a King. But who will be crowned royal star baker?

programme.title: Love, For Real
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Chloe Bridges. Best friends Hayley and Bree go on a dating show to publicize her fashion brand. But with love, friendship and careers on the line it could all go wrong.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A mechanic and her father compete with a rival repair shop to keep their shop afloat. Starring Katherine Barrell (2024)

programme.title: Butlers In Love
programme.desc: (2022) Christmas rom com with Stacey Faber. Sparks fly at the American Butler Academy as chalk and cheese students Emma and Henry clash. In learning to work together might they fall for each other?

programme.title: Splash of Love
programme.desc: (2022) Aquatic rom com with Rhiannon Fish. Out in the Pacific Northwest to study orcas, can Chloe find love with the help of local whale spotting guide Ben and not feel like a fish out of water?

programme.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programme.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Shenae Grimes-Beech. A small-town boy's proposal goes viral and scores him a prom date with a celebrity - but falling for the boy's teacher wasn't the plan.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: The Clue To Love
programme.desc: (2021) Romance starring Rachel Bles. Sparks fly when Audrey heads to Hope Cove to investigate a mysterious love advice column, only to be greeted by editor Morgan. But will her sleuthing lead to love?

programme.title: This Little Love Of Mine
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer returns to her island home to convince an old friend to take over his family's company - but rekindled feelings soon get in the way.

programme.title: Romance at the Vineyard
programme.desc: (2023) Sparkling romance with Susie Abromeit. As Allee tries to save her family's struggling vineyard, a charming stranger steps in to help. But will feelings turn sour when his identity is uncorked?

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Kimberley Crossman. A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival - but will love also be written in the stars?
